rows.label: tev035702_MSG0001
rows.name:
I have to say, you dress really well.
You might even give Victoria a run
for her fashion money, actually?[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035702_MSG0002
rows.name:
I love someone who's not afraid to play with
color, you know what I mean? Maybe we Ma-non
should take a page from from your book.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035702_MSG0003
rows.name:
...You know what? I'm gonna pick
your brain and work some of of these
fresh ideas into our new line.[ST:wait ]

rows.label: tev035702_MSG0004
rows.name:
Victoria and I are going to turn the
world of of intergalactic apparel
upside-down, I think? Yes! Just you wait![ST:wait ]
